name: io.github.travisbergen2/rpcs1-agent-tuner
title: RPCS-1 Agent Tuner & Translator
description: Diagnose why your AI agent will fail before rollout AND translate ambiguous human input into clear intent. Two tools in one: recommend_agent_configuration tunes runtime settings (temperature, top_p, strategy) to match your environment, while interpret, normalize, and rewrite help LLMs understand what users actually mean.
